title: Omnisend vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Omnisend and Sendinblue. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your needs.
intro: Omnisend and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both freemium email marketing platforms with SMS capabilities, but they serve different audiences. Omnisend specializes in e-commerce with omnichannel automation, while Sendinblue offers broader CRM and transactional email features. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right tool for your business.
choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce business needing integrated SMS and push notifications
You want pre-built workflows and a product picker for abandoned carts
Advanced segmentation for targeted campaigns is a priority
choose_b_if: You need a generous free tier with 100,000 contacts included
Transactional email and API access are essential for your business
You want a full CRM platform with chat and WhatsApp capabilities

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Omnisend is better for e-commerce brands needing omnichannel automation and SMS, while Sendinblue excels for transactional email and businesses wanting a broader CRM suite. Both have strong ratings (G2: 4.5 each), so choose based on your specific use case.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Omnisend or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue offers better free-tier value with 100,000 contacts versus Omnisend's 250. However, Omnisend's paid plans start at $16/month compared to Sendinblue's $25/month. Your actual cost depends on subscriber count and feature needs.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Omnisend?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list exports, making migration straightforward. Most email marketing tools allow you to import CSV files with your existing subscriber lists. Check both platforms' migration guides for detailed steps to ensure a smooth transition.
